name: Shadcn Standard
description: Clean, structural slate theme based on Radix UI conventions, standard 8px roundings, and fine dividers.
promptBlock: Style: Shadcn UI. Background is white, text is deep slate (#0f172a). Borders are thin slate (#e2e8f0). Use 8px border-radius. Button states are solid black filled, outlines are clean, and card margins are generous. Primary layout is clean, centered, and mimics shadcn/ui components (e.g. badge tags, subtle form containers, slate tabs, and structured grid cards).
